name: cs2-demo-analysis-kit
description: Reusable CS2 demo analysis models, QA reports, and previewable UI components.

scripts.python:test: cd python && uv run --extra dev pytest
scripts.export:demo: cd python && uv run cs2df export ../fixtures/demos/nju-rivals-2026/3671816592_1000003075.dem -o ../fixtures/output/nju-rivals-2026/
scripts.export:pro: cd python && uv run cs2df export-batch ../fixtures/demos/pro/ --out ../fixtures/output/pro.zip --descriptive
scripts.export:nju: cd python && uv run cs2df export-batch ../fixtures/demos/nju-rivals-2026/ --out ../fixtures/output/nju-rivals-2026.zip --descriptive
scripts.release:npm: pnpm build && pnpm test:all && pnpm typecheck && changeset publish
